name: stats
_note: cognitive-replay.stats is a LENS_ACTIONS domain handler (server/domains/cognitive-replay.js, PATH 3 via server/domains/index.js → 3-arg registerLensAction(ctx, artifact, params)). It aggregates the caller's live chat-session corpus on globalThis._concordSTATE.sessions — no DB, no user-supplied amount. sinceDays is fail-CLOSED clamped to [1,365] (Number(x)||7 then Math.min(365,Math.max(1,…))), so 1e308/Infinity/NaN/-1 can never produce a non-finite or out-of-range result. Degrade-graceful: an empty corpus returns ok:true with zeroed totals, never no_db. The assassin runs with an internal owner actor so ok:true is reachable (no no_actor).
